SpTU 4, 154 [recipes][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] x

(o 1') (traces)

o 2'2'

[...] ⸢u₂⸣NU.⸢LUḪ⸣.ḪA

(o 2') [...] nuhurtu-asafoetida

o 3'3'

[... u₂?]IN.NU.UŠ ŠINIG

(o 3') [...] maštakal-plant, tamarisk

o 4'4'

[...] GU₇

(o 4') [...] he eats [...].

o 5'5'

[... ZU₂].LUM.MA ZI₃.KUM

(o 5') [...] date, isqūqu-flour

o 6'6'

[...] ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂

(o 6') [...] (gloss: new break).

o 7'7'

[...] ⸢1/2⸣ SILA₃ ḪAB ŠEŠ

(o 7') You anoint [...] 1/2 qû of opopanax. You cool down [...]. You insert (it) into his anus.

o 8'8'

[...] ⸢SED⸣ ana DUR₂-šu₂ DUBak

o 9'9'

[...] ⸢šim⸣MUG ana IGI

(o 9') [...] ballukku-aromatic substance on the surface

o 10'10'

[...] ⸢ŠIM⸣ ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂NAG-MEŠ

(o 10') He drinks regularly [...] aromatic substance (gloss: new break).

o 11'11'

[...] ⸢KURUN⸣.NA NAG

(o 11') He drinks [...] kurunu-beer.

o 12'12'

[...] NAG

(o 12') He drinks [...].

o 13'13'

[...] ⸢GIN₂⸣ ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂10 GIN₂ BI

(o 13') [...] shekels (gloss: new break) those 10 shekels

o 14'14'

[...] ⸢GU₇⸣-MEŠ

(o 14') he eats regularly [...].

o 15'15'

[...] u₂KU.NU.LUḪ.ḪA

(o 15') You mix up [...] tīyatu-plant, [...] ballukku-aromatic substance, kukuru-wood, suādu-plant, [...] pith of grass (and) dates.

o 16'16'

[...] ⸢šim⸣MUG šimGUR₂.GUR₂ šimMAN.DU

o 17'17'

[... I₃].UDU KI.KAL ZU₂.LUM.MA ḪI.ḪI

o 18'18'

[... I₃].⸢NUN⸣.NA SU₃ ana DUR₂-šu₂ GAR-ma

(o 18') You spinkle [...] (and) butter. You put (it) into his anus. [...]. (This is) the tested treatment [...].

o 19'19'

[...] bul-ṭu lat-ku

o 20'20'

[...] ⸢šim⸣MUG u₂KUR.KUR gišGEŠTIN.KA₅.A

(o 20') [...], ballukku-aromatic substance, white hellebore, fox-vine,

[...] ina KUŠ SURri

r 4'4'

[...] x TI IM U U₄ ⸢TU₄⸣

(r 4') [...] ...

r 5'5'

[...] ⸢ḪA⸣ šimLI šimGAM.MA

(r 5') You cook [...] ..., juniper, ṣumlalû-plant, [...]. You pour oil on the surface.

r 6'6'

[...] ⸢ŠEG₆⸣šal I₃.GIŠ ana IGI ŠUBdi

r 7'7'

[...] ana ⸢DUR₂⸣-šu₂ DUBak

(r 7') You insert [...] into his anus.

r 8'8'

[...] x x (x) GIG

(r 8') (traces)

r 9'9'

[...] x x NU

r 10'10'

[...] šimGUR₂.GUR₂

(r 10') [...] kukuru-wood

r 11'11'

[...] ba-ri-ra-tu₄

(r 11') [...] sagapenum

r 12'12'

[...] U₄ 3-KAM tara-bak

(r 12') You boil down [...] (for) 3 days.

r 13'13'

[...] ⸢DUR₂⸣-šu₂ DUBak-ma DIN

(r 13') You insert [...] in his anus and he will recover.

r 14'14'

[...] x u₂KUŠ₈.LAGAB ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂

(r 14') [...] ... colocynth (gloss: new break)

[...] GIG
